explanation: This command uses the input stream redirect technique as described in the Sigma rule. It is a simplified version of the original test command and maintains the same behavior.
This command uses the alternative name for PowerShell (pwsh.exe) and maintains the input stream redirect technique. It is functionally equivalent to the original command.
This command adds the -Command flag explicitly, which is optional in the original command. It still uses the input stream redirect technique and is valid for testing.
This command adds the -noprofile flag, which is optional but does not affect the input stream redirect technique. It is still valid for testing.
This command combines multiple optional flags (-Command and -noprofile) with the input stream redirect technique. It is still valid for testing.
